parameters.content:
## Documentation Freshness Checker

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set DOCS_EMAIL_TO
3. Provide doc inventory with last-updated dates and owners
4. Code nodes flag stale docs (configurable staleness threshold) — no LLM
5. Approval gate before stale doc list is sent to document owners

parameters.subject: =Documentation Update Required: {{ $('Format Freshness Report').first().json.meta.stale_count }} docs need review
